The '''Gerb''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] lagomorph [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the moon [[Yavin 13/Legends|Yavin 13]].

==Biology and appearance==
Gerbs were covered in short fur and had large [[Color/Legends|pink]] ears and large black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].  The Gerbs moved by hopping and jumping with their long hind legs. The species' ears were used for hearing and moderating their body temperature. They were lined with a network of small blood vessels that could dissipate heat. Gerbs were also immune to Slith bites which were venomous to most other species.<ref name="AE" />
[[File:Chicak.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Chichak]], a Gerb hero]]

==Society and culture==
They lived in small underground warrens consisting of ten families. Gerbs spoke the squeaking [[Gerbese]] language, though they could also speak the hissing [[Slithese]] language which was spoken by the moon's other sentient species, the serpentine [[Slith]]. The Gerbs were able to live in peace with the Slith and both species often left themselves alone.  Both species also knew nothing or little about offworld affairs and technology since none had left Yavin 13. They practiced simple farming on the few grasslands of the desert moon.<ref name="AE" />

==History==
As part of their efforts to crush the [[New Jedi Order]], the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaded and conquered the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]]. In addition to razing the [[Jedi Praxeum|Jedi temple]] on Yavin 4, they wiped Yavin 13 and Yavin 8 clean of life—causing the extinction of the Gerb.<ref name="GATOR">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref>
